<?php namespace Barryvdh\Debugbar\Controllers; use Barryvdh\Debugbar\Support\Clockwork\Converter; use DebugBar\OpenHandler; use Illuminate\Http\Response; use Laravel\Telescope\Contracts\EntriesRepository; use Laravel\Telescope\IncomingEntry; use Laravel\Telescope\Storage\EntryQueryOptions; use Laravel\Telescope\Telescope; class TelescopeController extends BaseController { public function show(EntriesRepository $storage, $uuid) { $entry = $storage->find($uuid); $result = $storage->get('request', (new EntryQueryOptions())->batchId($entry->batchId))->first(); return redirect(config('telescope.domain') . '/' . config('telescope.path') . '/requests/' . $result->id); } }
